message:
chore: add imessage connector to workspace, update Cargo.lock, ignore .bv/ in beads

Add connectors/imessage to workspace members. Update Cargo.lock with
new dependencies. Add .bv/ (beads viewer local config) to .beads/.gitignore.
Update beads issue tracking metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -45,3 +45,6 @@ beads.right.meta.json
 
 # bv (beads viewer) lock file
 .bv.lock
+
+# bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
+.bv/

@@ -3042,6 +3042,30 @@ dependencies = [
  "wiremock",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "fcp-imessage"
+version = "0.1.0"
+dependencies = [
+ "anyhow",
+ "async-trait",
+ "base64 0.22.1",
+ "chrono",
+ "fcp-async-core",
+ "fcp-core",
+ "fcp-crypto",
+ "fcp-sdk",
+ "hex",
+ "reqwest 0.13.2",
+ "serde",
+ "serde_json",
+ "sha2",
+ "thiserror 2.0.18",
+ "tracing",
+ "tracing-subscriber",
+ "uuid",
+ "wiremock",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "fcp-intercom"
 version = "0.1.0"
@@ -3276,6 +3300,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "fcp-core",
  "fcp-sdk",
  "fcp-streaming",
+ "percent-encoding",
  "reqwest 0.13.2",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
@@ -3476,6 +3501,30 @@ dependencies = [
  "wiremock",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "fcp-nextcloud-talk"
+version = "0.1.0"
+dependencies = [
+ "anyhow",
+ "async-trait",
+ "chrono",
+ "fcp-async-core",
+ "fcp-core",
+ "fcp-crypto",
+ "fcp-sdk",
+ "hex",
+ "percent-encoding",
+ "reqwest 0.13.2",
+ "serde",
+ "serde_json",
+ "sha2",
+ "thiserror 2.0.18",
+ "tracing",
+ "tracing-subscriber",
+ "url",
+ "wiremock",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "fcp-notion"
 version = "0.1.0"
@@ -4535,7 +4584,9 @@ dependencies = [
  "chrono",
  "fcp-async-core",
  "fcp-core",
+ "fcp-crypto",
  "fcp-sdk",
+ "fcp-testkit",
  "fcp-webhook",
  "hex",
  "hmac",

@@ -97,6 +97,7 @@ members = [
     "connectors/semanticscholar",
     "connectors/mattermost",
     "connectors/matrix",
+    "connectors/imessage",
     "connectors/teams",
     "connectors/whatsapp",
     "connectors/monday",
@@ -123,7 +124,9 @@ members = [
     "connectors/annas-archive",
     "connectors/make",
     "connectors/bigquery",
+    "connectors/nextcloud-talk",
     "connectors/whisper",
+    "connectors/imessage",
 ]
 
 # Default to the FCP2 platform core crates (connectors are explicitly targeted).
